name: openiap
description: Help Codex inspect and implement in-app purchase flows with OpenIAP.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and implement in-app purchase flows.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to OpenIAP workflows for app in-app purchase implementation, purchase-flow review, SDK setup snippets, product catalog checks, subscription analytics, webhook simulation, and IAPKit-backed receipt-validation operations.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenIAP to review my in-app purchase flow.
Use OpenIAP to generate an Expo setup snippet.
Use OpenIAP to summarize IAPKit purchases.
